title: Innovative Light Dutch Pastry Puff
description: A garlicky and aerated Dutch pastry featuring pineapple juice and Mediterranean-friendly flavors, made with laminated puff pastry.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a small bowl, mix together the pineapple juice, garlic, and olive oil.
Brush the mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border on either side.
Sprinkle the feta cheese and parsley over the brushed area.
Fold the 1 inch borders over the filling, then roll the pastry into a tight log.
Cut the log into 8 equal pieces and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
